title: Bowlbug (Rock)
move_pattern: Starts with Headbutt. After attacking, if off-balance uses Dizzy (which stuns and clears the off-balance state). Otherwise repeats Headbutt.
notes: This monster has an off-balance mechanic controlled by ImbalancedPower. When off-balance, its Headbutt attack triggers an automatic self-stun (Dizzy) that removes the off-balance state, allowing it to return to normal attacks.
